summary.summary: Adds a single-line animation to the bolus progress bar view: the RoundedRectangle mask used to render the progress bar width now has .animation(.easeInOut(duration: 0.25), value: progress) applied (see diff:c7a8eefcca85 and file:ea324e884104). This change is described in the PR (pr:nightscout/Trio#1242 / pr:gordolio/Trio#1242) and recorded in commit 9a1e15bf804f (merged via commit 033d55bc66e4).
summary.userFacingImpact: Visual change: the bolus progress bar will animate (easeInOut, 0.25s) when progress updates, producing a subtle animated transition (diff:c7a8eefcca85; pr:nightscout/Trio#1242). The modification appears to be cosmetic based on the supplied sources, but the provided information does not include an explicit safety or dosing impact analysis; human review is required to confirm there are no unintended interactions with timing-sensitive UI or safety-critical behaviour (file:ea324e884104; commit:9a1e15bf804f).
